name: agent-task-board
description: LAN task coordination board for AI coding agents (MCP server over Streamable HTTP)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/db/schema.sql dist/db/schema.sql && cp src/web/board.html src/web/onboard.html src/web/report-bug.html src/web/setup.md dist/web/ && cp CHANGELOG.md dist/CHANGELOG.md && rm -rf dist/adoption && cp -r adoption dist/adoption
